candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; preferable to duplicate total row.
Duplicate top-line total with identical values; useful as fallback label across years.

variables.notes: Selected revenue labels as a priority list, not for summation.

candidates.why: Best aggregate direct cost / cost of sales style line; includes materials and services used in production/service delivery.

candidates.row_label: Purchases of materials, supplies and goods
candidates.why: Direct-cost component but narrower than the broader aggregate row.

variables.notes: Preferred the broader direct-cost bucket over individual components to avoid partial coverage.

candidates.why: Core overhead bucket below gross profit and above EBIT; appropriate SG&A-type operating expense.
Personnel cost is a standard SG&A component when no explicit SG&A line exists.
Can be SG&A-related, but likely already embedded in employee expenses; selecting separately risks double counting.
Appears nested within Materials and Services, which is more COGS-like/direct cost than overhead here.
Dedicated R&D line exists but appears in supplemental section below EBIT, so should not be included in XSGA under the placement rule.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A row exists. Chose the best overhead buckets and excluded External Services as likely direct cost, Share-Based Compensation as likely embedded in Employee expenses, and R&D because the dedicated line appears below EBIT in the preview.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line; best match for XRD.
Includes capitalized amounts as well as expense, so less appropriate than the pure expense line.
Capitalized development spend is not period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Mapped to the dedicated R&D expense line only. Did not include in XSGA because the R&D line appears below EBIT in the statement preview.

candidates.why: Primary recurring interest cost line.
Recurring financing cost component that should be included with interest expense.
Total finance expense includes FX/other items, so less preferred than granular recurring components.
May include recurring finance costs, but composition is unclear and could overlap with totals or non-interest items.

variables.notes: Used granular recurring interest components and avoided total Financial expenses because it includes FX and other non-interest items.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent
candidates.why: Best owner-only equity measure; excludes non-controlling interests.
Includes non-controlling interests and is therefore less preferred when parent equity is available.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Standard balance-sheet line for minority interest / NCI.
Duplicate synonym for NCI; useful fallback across years.

variables.notes: Selected balance-sheet NCI labels as a priority list, not for summation.
